page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

HESP - Hearing and Speech Sciences

HESP120 Introduction to Linguistics (3 Credits)

An introduction to the scientific study of natural language with focus on the basic concepts of phonology, syntax, semantics and pragmatics, with subsequent attention to the applied aspects of linguistic principles. Additional Information: HESP120 is required for HESP majors. HESP majors may not substitute LING200.
